label_verbatim: (Name of Limited Liability Partnership in Jurisdiction of Organization)
rationale: LLP's legal name in its home (foreign) jurisdiction. Same key family as MLLC-12 / FICT-4 (foreign-entity-name convention).

label_verbatim: FIRST: The proposed limited liability partnership name* to be used in this State:
rationale: Alternate name used in Maine when the home-jurisdiction name lacks an LLP suffix per 31 MRSA §803-A. Same key as MLLC-12.

label_verbatim: SECOND: ...the fictitious name under which it proposes to apply for authority to do business in the State of Maine is
rationale: Fictitious Maine name when the home name is unavailable. Same key as MLLC-12 / FICT-4.
Date the LLP was organized in its home jurisdiction. Same key as MLLC-12.
Home state or country where the LLP was organized. Same key as MLLC-12.

label_verbatim: FOURTH: Address of the registered or principal office, wherever located, is: (physical location - street (not P.O. Box), city, state and zip code)
rationale: Single-line physical address of the principal office (may be outside Maine; not P.O. Box). Same key as MLLC-12.

label_verbatim: FOURTH: (mailing address if different from above)
rationale: Optional principal-office mailing address. Same key as MLLC-12.
Boolean opt-in indicating Form FICT-4 (fictitious-name registration) is bundled with this application. Same key as MLLC-12 / LP_MLPA-12A.

label_verbatim: FIFTH: ...The nature of the business or purposes to be conducted or promoted in the State of Maine is
rationale: Free-text description of activities to be conducted in Maine. Same key as MLLC-12 (analogous FIFTH paragraph).
Right-aligned narrow blank on the Commercial Registered Agent row.
Commercial-RA name (populated when registered_agent.type='commercial').
Noncommercial-RA name (populated when registered_agent.type='noncommercial').

label_verbatim: SIXTH: (physical location, not P.O. Box – street, city, state and zip code)
rationale: Maine physical address of the registered agent (not P.O. Box).

label_verbatim: SIXTH: (mailing address if different from above)
rationale: Optional mailing address for the registered agent.
Name of the LLP's contact partner. Single inline row on this form; further partners go on an attached exhibit (Check Box26).
Combined business/residence/mailing address of the contact partner (single line).

label_verbatim: NINTH: The date on which the foreign limited liability partnership first did, or intends to do, business in the State of Maine is
rationale: Date the LLP commenced or intends to commence Maine activities. Same key family as MLLC-12 (entity.maine_activities_start_date).

First line of the professional-services description for a foreign professional LLP under 13 MRSA Chapter 22-A. Two-line variant of MLLC-12's single-widget entity.professional_services_description (this template provides two underlined blanks instead of one). Distinct from MLLC-12 because the form's physical widget composition differs.
Second line of the professional-services description.
Independent checkbox (on-state Yes) verified by geometry+text on page 1; enum_select value 'commercial'.
Independent checkbox (on-state Yes) verified by geometry+text on page 1; enum_select value 'noncommercial'.

label_verbatim: [ ] Names and addresses of additional contact partners are attached as Exhibit ___, and made a part hereof
rationale: Boolean opt-in for an additional-contact-partners exhibit. Note: the corresponding inline blank for the exhibit-letter is not extracted as an AcroForm widget on this template (see open_questions).
Date of signature in the page-2 signature block.

label_verbatim: (Authorized Signature**) / (Type or print name and capacity)
rationale: Individual-signer printed name and capacity (Shape D). The wet-ink Authorized Signature line itself is not AcroForm-bound; this widget captures the typed name+capacity below.

label_verbatim: For Authorized Signature(s) ** on behalf of Entities: Name of Entity
rationale: Name of the entity signing on behalf of the LLP (used when the LLP is signed for by another entity rather than by an individual). Parallel to the per-officer-signer pattern's <role>_entity_N.name (see schema-gaps/2026-04-30-per-officer-signer-pattern.md), applied to filing.signer.*.

label_verbatim: For Authorized Signature(s) ** on behalf of Entities: By (Authorized signature) / (Type or print name and capacity)
rationale: Printed name and capacity of the natural person who signs for the entity (parallel to <role>_entity_N.signer_printed_name_and_capacity in the per-officer-signer convention).

label_verbatim: Name of entity(s) on the submitted filings [1]
rationale: Cover-letter row 1.

widget_id: Name of entitys on the submitted filings 2
rationale: Cover-letter row 2 — useful when the foreign-qualification application is bundled with FICT-4 (Check Box23).

label_verbatim: Hold attested copy for pick up
rationale: Expedite tier 'hold_for_pickup'.
Expedite tier '24h_next_business_day'.
Expedite tier 'immediate_same_day'.
Total fees ($250 base per page-0 'Filing Fee $250.00').
Contact name.
Contact phone.

widget_id: Contact email address for this filing
label_verbatim: Contact email address for this filing
rationale: Filing-specific contact email.

widget_id: Email address to use for annual report reminders
label_verbatim: Email address to use for annual report reminders
rationale: Annual-report reminder email.
Recipient name.
Recipient firm.
Recipient street.
Recipient city/state/zip combined.
